title: Shared documentation
description: Write SKILL.md at .apm/skills/pyxlsx/SKILL.md. Content must cover: quick command reference with example invocations and JSON output for all 11 commands, the output contract (JSON default, --plain, errors to stderr, exit codes), the formula evaluation caveat (open in Excel/LibreOffice before relying on cached values), ready-made openpyxl script patterns for table creation and bulk writes, and a cross-skill agent workflow example (extract from xlsx with table read, process, write to pptx via pypptx).
acceptance_criteria: All 12 commands are documented with example invocations and representative JSON output
Output contract section explains JSON default, --plain, stderr, and exit codes
openpyxl escape hatch section provides working script patterns for table creation and cell writes
Formula evaluation caveat is clearly explained
Agent workflow section shows an extract-xlsx-to-pptx example
